briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: Read and parse DOCX documents, extracting lines with metadata, tables, and attachments into UnstructuredDocument.

detaileddescription.para: \par \b Scope\/ \: Document parsing pipeline: DOCX format reading. \par \b Input\/ \: [File path (str), parameters (Optional[dict]) — document on disk.] \par \b Output\/ \: [UnstructuredDocument with lines, tables, attachments, and warnings.] \par \b Links\/ \: [USES_API(9): dedoc.data_structures.*; USES_API(8): dedoc.readers.BaseReader] \par \b Invariants\/ \:

listitem.para: read() ALWAYS returns an UnstructuredDocument. \par \b Rationale\/ \:

detaileddescription.para: Q: Why is this reader separated from others? A: Each reader handles one format family — isolation prevents format coupling and simplifies extension. \par \b Changes\/ \:
LAST_CHANGE: [v1.0.0 – Added SEMANTIC TEMPLATE markup and LDD logging.] \par \b Module Map\/ \:
